sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Gamers Now Watch More Than They Play - How Publishers Can Reclaim Lost Revenue: Report - Alphabet  ( NASDAQ:GOOG ) , Alphabet  ( NASDAQ:GOOGL )
feed.summary: Gamers now spend 8.5 hours weekly watching gaming videos on platforms like YouTube and Twitch, compared to 7.4 hours playing games. Midia Research says this shift is a missed revenue opportunity for publishers, who could reclaim engagement and tap into new advertisers..
